themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And David built there an altar unto the LORD, and offered burnt offerings and peace offerings...". Word-study detail reinforces "וּשְׁלָמִ֑ים: and peace offerings - properly, requital, i.e., a (voluntary) sacrifice in thanks".

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Notwithstanding the king's word prevailed against Joab, and against the captains of the host....". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".
